VIII. Plans & consultation 008 / 010

Choose the right Aro plan

One flat rate, built to scale with your studio.

Beta access is available for studios ready to adopt early while the platform evolves.

Beta Access · Starter Plan

Rs. 6,990.00/= per month per studio

Everything you need to run your studio smoothly. One‑month free trial. No credit card required.

  • Studio management portal
  • Customer booking app
  • Class & timetable management
  • Customer bookings & attendance tracking
  • Basic reporting
  • Payment acceptance via PayHere integration
Book a demo
Consultation

Let’s find the perfect fit together.

Share your studio details and we’ll set up a walkthrough in your timezone.

100% transparent pricing · No setup fees · Change plans anytime

Beta launch access

Studios joining during the Beta Launch Phase receive one month of introductory access at no charge. Beta pricing applies during launch and may be updated post‑launch with advance notice.

Transparent by default

  • One‑month free trial to test everything risk‑free.
  • No per‑booking charges or hidden commissions.
  • 24/7 support included with every plan.
IX. Support & help 009 / 010

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know
Is Aro available in Sinhala and Tamil?

Yes. Aro’s interface and notifications support Sinhala, Tamil, and English so you and your clients can use the platform in your preferred language.

Can I accept payments in LKR?

Yes. Accept online, cash, and bank payments in LKR with automatic reconciliation and PayHere integration.

Is there local customer support?

Yes. You’ll get friendly, Sri Lanka‑based support in your timezone whenever you need it.

How long does it take to set up?

Create your studio account in minutes. Aro’s onboarding team helps you go live quickly without complex setup.

X. Ready to ascend 010 / 010
